title: Lo-Fi Study (Rainy Afternoon)
summary: Mellow 72 BPM lo-fi hip-hop with vinyl crackle, jazzy keys, and soft rain underneath.
prompt: A mellow lo-fi hip-hop beat at 72 BPM. Warm vinyl crackle, jazzy electric piano chord progression in a minor key, brushed drums with soft kick, mellow upright bass walking line, subtle rain ambience layered underneath. Cozy, contemplative, perfect for studying on a rainy afternoon. No vocals.
